message:
feat(glow): Complete browser and github modules with proper exports

- Add FileBrowser for interactive markdown file discovery
  - Navigation with keyboard (vim-style j/k and arrows)
  - Filtering with / to narrow file list
  - Directory traversal with Enter and Backspace
  - Hidden files toggle
  - All 12 browser tests pass

- Add GitHubFetcher for README fetching (behind github feature flag)
  - Parse multiple repo formats (owner/repo, HTTPS, SSH, github.com)
  - Authentication via GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable
  - Local caching with TTL expiration
  - Rate limiting handling
  - All 9 github tests pass

- Export browser and github modules from lib.rs
- Update beads: close charmed_rust-213, 4ku, amx, 2pt2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
